evidence_basis_summary: Humans set hard admissibility rules (real data only, simulated-data papers auto-rejected, public-API-only scope) that the agent must obey, per methodology page.
notes: Upgrade: methodology page explicitly names human-set admissibility rules; upgraded from unclear to conditional because rule-setting persists but execution is delegated.

evidence_basis_summary: Human-designed judge rubric penalizes weak identification, failed placebos, and violated assumptions, and code-scanning flags fabricated results - causal-logic gatekeeping is encoded by humans but enforced by models.
notes: Upgrade: methodology explicitly lists identification/placebo/robustness as what the rubric rewards and penalizes; role is visible and conditional, not unclear.

evidence_basis_summary: Sources concern econometric paper quality in a tournament, not construct definition or perspective pluralism; role has no purchase here.

evidence_basis_summary: APE restricts itself to public-API quantitative data with no debate over corpus coverage or machine-friendliness bias; role does not arise.
notes: Upgrade to high: methodology's Real Data Only / public APIs principle makes non-applicability definitive.

evidence_basis_summary: Humans designed the tournament, position-swapping, TrueSkill, six-stage review, integrity checks, git-commit audit trail, file locking, and full open-source release of code/data/papers.
notes: Upgrade to high/robust: methodology and leaderboard page document the entire human-built protocol scaffold in detail.

evidence_basis_summary: Humans flag that tournament ranking is an internal quality proxy, not peer review or policy-grade evidence - explicit warnings block transport of results to policy use.
notes: Upgrade to high: repeated caveats (should not be used for evidence-based policy making, noisy and potentially biased signal, not ground truth) directly concern transportability.

evidence_basis_summary: No fieldwork, interviews, or tacit-context interpretation appears; APE is a fully computational pipeline over public data.
notes: Upgrade to high: both sources describe an end-to-end computational workflow with no situated human interaction.

notes: Upgrade to high/robust: methodology page is largely a calibration-architecture document; strongest role in the case.
